_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of security models (e.g., Bell-LaPadula model, Biba integrity model, Clark-Wilson integrity model).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of model interpretability and explainability methods, including SHAP values, LIME, partial dependence plots, and when explanation requirements should influence model selection.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-002 (DA, cosine: 0.486), SP-K-013 (SP, cosine: 0.468).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.1/10 (raw 0.507). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, model]. DCWF-only terms [bell, biba, clark, integrity, lapadula, models] vs WIDAI-only terms [dependence, explainability, explanation, influence, interpretability, lime] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.848 (P=0.840, R=0.856). Balanced P/R — the 13-word DCWF element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of security models (e.g., Bell-LaPadula model, Biba integrity model, C" and "Knowledge of model interpretability and explainability methods, including SHAP v". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 ≈ STS 0.507 (gap 0.000). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, model] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, model]. DCWF-only: [bell, biba, clark, integrity, lapadula, models]. WIDAI-only: [dependence, explainability, explanation, influence, interpretability, lime].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.6% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
